benchmark_documents_contractor_identity_.name: benchmark_documents_contractor_identity_check
benchmark_documents_contractor_identity_.value: ("benchmark_documents"."contractor_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("benchmark_documents"."external_contractor_name" IS NOT NULL AND length(trim("benchmark_documents"."external_contractor_name")) > 0)

document_advisories_subject_check.name: document_advisories_subject_check
document_advisories_subject_check.value: ("document_advisories"."devis_id" IS NOT NULL) <> ("document_advisories"."invoice_id" IS NOT NULL)
